zh.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: 荷蘭努-布拉班特阿斯特斯登
zh.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight是Arnoud II heer van Heusden和Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg的兒子，出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特斯登。他於1240年與Margaretha van Rosendaele結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1268年10月15日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight是Arnoud II heer van Heusden和Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg的儿子，出生在荷兰努-布拉班特斯登。他于1240年与Margaretha van Rosendaele结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1268年10月15日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Heusden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ousden (Suffolk) with prosthetic initial H-. The placename derives from Old English ūf ‘owl’ (genitive ūfes) + denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Hendrik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight was born in Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands as the son of Arnoud II heer van Heusden and Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg. He married Margaretha van Rosendaele in 1240. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 15 October 1268, in Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight est né à Heusden, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, fils de Arnoud II heer van Heusden et Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg. Il a épousé Margaretha van Rosendaele en 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1268, à Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight wurde in Heusden, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande, als Sohn von Arnoud II heer van Heusden und Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg geboren. Er hat 1240 Margaretha van Rosendaele geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1268 in Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: Heusden, Asten, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi
it.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight è nato il nel Heusden, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi come figlio di Arnoud II heer van Heusden e Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg. Lui sposato Margaretha van Rosendaele nel 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 15 ottobre 1268, nel Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knightはオランダノオルド-ブラバントヘウスデンでArnoud II heer van HeusdenとMechtild von Kleve-Heinsbergの息子として生まれた。1240年にMargaretha van Rosendaeleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1268年10月15日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight(은)는 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 헤우즈든에서 Arnoud II heer van Heusden(와)과 Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1240년 Margaretha van Rosendaele(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1268년 10월 15일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 ko에서 사망했다.

pt.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: Heusden, Asten, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight nasceu em Heusden, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos filho de Arnoud II heer van Heusden e Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg. Ele casou-se com Margaretha van Rosendaele em 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1268, em Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ro.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: Heusden, Asten, Noord-Brabant, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight родился в местности хеусден, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды. Его родителей звали Arnoud II heer van Heusden и Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha van Rosendaele в 1240 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 15 октября 1268 г. в местности кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Heusden Knight nació en Heusden, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos como hijo de Arnoud II heer van Heusden y Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg. Se casó con Margaretha van Rosendaele en 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1268, en Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
